title: PlatformContracts
description: Unified platform object model — canonical dataclass shapes consumed by the registry, HTTP API, TypeScript worlds runner, and UI. Mirrors the_similarity/platform/contracts.py field-for-field. Each top-level type is referenced via $defs so TS consumers can validate individual records.

RunKind.description: Which kind of run this is. Drives dispatch in consumers across every pillar.

RunStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a run row. Linear state machine: pending -> running -> (succeeded|failed).

RunRecord.description: Canonical platform run row. Superset of the legacy RunArtifact — adds status + pillar. Consumed by the registry and the HTTP API.

run_id.description: UUID4 hex (no dashes, 32 chars). Primary key in the registry.

config.description: JSON-serializable inputs to the run. Free-form per kind.

seed.description: Integer RNG seed, or null if not meaningful.

summary.description: Headline numbers safe to index without loading bulk artifacts.

pillar.description: Free-form pillar tag for cross-pillar queries (finance, synthetic, worlds, events, nl_ts, eval).

artifact_paths.description: Logical name -> path relative to the run directory. Preserved from RunArtifact for backward-compatible round-trips.

provenance.description: Reproducibility record. Accepts either the legacy synthetic shape or the extended Provenance shape (see #/$defs/Provenance).

ArtifactRecord.description: File-level metadata for one artifact belonging to a run.

path.description: Relative path inside the run directory.

size_bytes.description: Size in bytes; optional because stat() is sometimes deferred.

checksum.description: SHA-256 hex; optional because full-file hashes are expensive.

ScorecardSummary.description: Condensed scorecard row. Full scorecard stays on disk as an artifact.

overall_score.description: Aggregate in [0, 1], or null when not normalized.

passed.description: Gate pass/fail, or null when no gate was applied.

thresholds.description: Numeric thresholds used for the gate decision.

details.description: Small nested metric snapshot; full detail on disk.

Provenance.description: Cross-pillar reproducibility record. Superset of the synthetic shape — adds env for runtime environment capture.

source_id.description: Source dataset/corpus ID; null for worlds / eval runs without a single source.

generator_version.description: Semantic version bumped whenever output distribution changes.

seed.description: RNG seed. Null for runs where a seed is not meaningful.

env.description: Runtime environment: {python, node, platform, git_sha}. Free-form.

ScenarioSpec.description: Scenario definition for worlds / simulation pillars.

version.description: Semantic version. Bump when engine behavior changes.

DatasetSpec.description: Dataset registration row. One per real or synthetic corpus.

source.description: Filesystem path, URL, or synthetic-run pointer (synthetic:<run_id>).

schema_uri.description: Optional URI pointing at a JSON schema describing the dataset columns.

checksum.description: SHA-256 hex of the source file(s); optional.

metadata.description: Free-form tags (pillar, tickers, date range, license).
